mano_cua.result_summary: Dashboard UI框架正常渲染（导航栏、搜索框、New Project按钮均可见），但核心功能无法测试。GraphQL API(localhost:4000)未运行，getProjects查询返回ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED，页面显示'Error: Failed to fetch'。需要MongoDB+API后端才能测试运行记录列表功能。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Dashboard UI framework renders correctly but GraphQL API backend is not running, making it impossible to test the runs list functionality.

deploy_notes.workaround: Built @sorry-cypress/common first, then started dashboard. Requires MongoDB + GraphQL API on port 4000 for full functionality.
deploy_notes.limitation: Monorepo needs MongoDB + API + Director services for full testing. Dashboard alone only renders UI shell.
